'''Kara Reenogga''' was one of the [[Reenogga Sisters|Reenogga triplets]] and co-owner of [[Reenogga Personal Services, Cubed]]. She was known for her fiery temperament and stubbornness. She frequented [[Chabak's]] and enjoyed gambling, drinking contests, fistfights, and took pleasure in helping her friend [[Quink]] keep [[Padda|his cousin]] out of trouble by beating up anybody that was out to harm him.<ref name="ZA" />
